subject: Proper Adjustments for Motion Correction
body:
Dear All,

I already asked for the adjustment for CTF correction and Wim Hagen kindly 
instructed me to proceed down to 30A and it is now working very well. Now I 
have some problems in motion correction in larger pixel sizes. Which 
adjustment do you recommend for motion correction? The image alignment is 
done by the Falcon hardware currently yields better resolution.

Best Regards,

Ferrie
